# API Examples

Public test endpoints you can use with the HTTP tools:

## httpbin.org

- `https://httpbin.org/get` — Returns GET request info
- `https://httpbin.org/json` — Returns a sample JSON response
- `https://httpbin.org/headers` — Returns request headers
- `https://httpbin.org/ip` — Returns origin IP
- `https://httpbin.org/user-agent` — Returns User-Agent
- `https://httpbin.org/status/200` — Returns specific HTTP status
- `https://httpbin.org/delay/1` — Delays response by N seconds

## JSONPlaceholder

- `https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1` — Sample post
- `https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users` — Sample user list
- `https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/todos?_limit=5` — Sample todos

## Other

- `https://api.github.com/zen` — Random GitHub Zen quote
- `https://api.github.com/octocat` — ASCII Octocat
